content:
# session_93 (iter-093) — review summary

## Metadata
- Stage: prover. SOLO `mathlib-build` lane, 1 `.lean` file edited (`TensorObjSubstrate.lean`).
- Sorry (file `TensorObjSubstrate.lean`): 1 → 1. The 13 inserted decls add ZERO new sorries; the
  single residual = dead private `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L716), untouched per objectives.
- Build: `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjSubstrate` **EXIT 0, 8562 jobs** (prover-run;
  monster-free cone, no OOM). sync_leanok iter 93 (sha fa6bcc2): **+28 / −0 `\leanok`** across
  `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` + `Picard_RelPicFunctor.tex` — consistent with the 13 green ports.
- Targets: re-port the v4.31-DELETED δ/η-collapse ROOT machinery (the iter-092 KEYSTONE GAP).

## What landed — the keystone re-port
The Jun-27 v4.31 bump had **deleted** (not `sorry`'d, no flag) a ~690-LOC δ/η-collapse block from the
ROOT `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` (v4.30 `117100c4` L4077–4768), gating BOTH K1
(`pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion`) and B1 (`tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap`,
which needs the EQUATION form). iter-093 re-ported the whole block — **13 declarations, all axiom-clean**
(`[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, no `sorryAx`) — inserted before `end LocTrivPullbackTensor`:

1. `restrictScalars_δ_app_tmul` (L3906) — transitive dep, ALSO dropped by the bump (v4.30 L2130), needed by item 8.
2. `isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid` (L3927) — generic category helper.
3. `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_base_unit` (L3940).
4–5. `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_{unit,counit}_app_app_apply` (L3972/3993, private, `rfl` value lemmas).
6. `restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_η_app_one` (L4011) — η-side.
7. `pushforward_eta_appIso_collapse` (L4037, private) — η-side.
8–9. `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_{rhs,lhs}_tmul` (L4178/4206; item 9 = the ~220-LOC heavy one, ported clean, NO OOM).
10. `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` (L4426).
11. `deltaConjOfMuComparison` (L4478) — needed the new mate-reduction fix.
12. **`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` (L4544) — THE keystone EQUATION** (unblocks B1 + K1).
13. `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj` (L4618).

## v4.31 fixes (only two needed beyond verbatim)
- **Axis #1 (α-naturality, 6 sites):** `{ app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }` no longer
  auto-discharges its `naturality` default (v4.31 `aesop_cat` fails on the new appIso-inverse form). Fix:
  add `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i` **aligned to the `app` column** (over-indent
  → parser reads it as a continuation of the `app` lambda → "unexpected `:=`").
- **NEW axis (mate reductions, `deltaConjOfMuComparison` only):** v4.30's
  `rw [hLHS]; simp [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ_assoc]` no longer fires — the `@[simp]` mate
  reductions `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app(_assoc)` / `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_δ(_assoc)` stopped
  auto-applying; `simp` only distributes `G.map` and reports the arg unused. Fix (4 iterated attempts —
  see milestones): explicit rewrites **inside `conv_rhs`** (full-goal motive fails — post-`hLHS` LHS
  carries a mate not type-correct under `instances` transparency), the two mate `reassoc_of%` via **`erw`**
  (unit source prints `(𝟭 C).obj (A⊗B)` vs lemma's `A⊗B`, defeq-not-syntactic), and
  `← hnat, ← Category.assoc, tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` as **ONE `erw`** call (splitting them makes
  `← Category.assoc` unfindable).
The other 11 lemmas ported **verbatim** (existing `respectTransparency false` + `maxHeartbeats 1600000`
flags carried over). Item 9 (the heavy 220-LOC `_lhs_tmul`) ported with **no fix and no OOM** —
confirming the monster-free cone.

## Review-subagent verdicts (both clean)
- **lean-auditor** `iter093` (0 crit / 2 major / 3 minor): all 13 decls GENUINE — no `sorry`/cheats/axiom
  leakage; the two `rfl` value lemmas are plausible definitional equalities; the long proofs are genuine
  tactic proofs. Majors are **doc-only**: (a) L716 `exists_tensorObj_inverse` is a dead/unconsumed private
  sorry whose functional public twin is `TensorObjInverse.lean:2366` — file header L137 incorrectly lists
  it as public API (stale); (b) the `/- Planner strategy (iter-027): … PROVE THIS -/` block at L4418
  is a false open-task signal sitting above the now-proven `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`.
  Report: `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter093.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `tensorobjsubstrate-iter093` (PASS, 0 must-fix / 2 minor): all 12 `\lean{}`
  targets resolve to real, faithfully-stated, genuinely-proven decls; 0 red flags. Minor 1:
  `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul` is stated in Lean strictly more generally (abstract
  `restrictScalars φ'`) than the K1-specific prose — faithful, bridged by `rfl`-defeq `pushforward_mu_eq`;
  suggest one blueprint prose line noting the abstraction. Minor 2: `isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid` is an
  unreferenced/unused private helper (dead re-ported code). Report:
  `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjsubstrate-iter093.md`.

## Convergence: CONVERGING
4th file/milestone of the v4.31 migration route advancing. The route's KEYSTONE GAP (iter-092 discovery)
is now CLOSED — the equation form `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` exists and is axiom-clean. Next iter
serializes downstream to `TensorObjInverse.lean`: B1 fill (consumes the equation) + K1 file-split (its own
6.4M-HB proof still OOMs in place → needs a leaf module).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. sync_leanok ran correctly (iter 93, +28/−0, EXIT 0 confirms the ports). No `\mathlibok` warranted
  (all 13 are project proofs, not Mathlib re-exports). No `\lean{}` renames (signatures frozen). No stale
  `\notready`. The lvb minor-1 abstraction note is blueprint *prose* (plan agent's domain) — recorded in
  recommendations, not annotated here.

## Blueprint-doctor
Clean — no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no new `axiom` decls.

## Notes (LOW)
- Coverage debt: only `isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid` (generic private helper, effort 0) is newly unmatched among
  the 13 ports; the other 12 have intact blueprint entries (incl. `restrictScalars_δ_app_tmul` =
  `lem:restrictscalars_delta_app_tmul` at chapter L10540). Total unmatched 154 — see recommendations.
